title: error
description: Structured error event. Carries WHAT failed (kind + message + optional location/form/backtrace), distinct from eval_end which only carries THAT something failed. A single evaluation may emit zero or more error envelopes before its eval_end.

kind.description: Error class. maxima_error = merror call; lisp_error = unhandled Lisp condition; parser_error = lex/parse failure pre-evaluation; timeout / cancelled = lifecycle outcomes.

form.description: Optional offending source form as a string.

recoverable.description: True when the error is non-fatal (evaluation may continue). Encoded as JSON null when unspecified; false is the kernel default.
